holdings.infoBox: VUSG is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.14%, Microsoft at 11.56%, Apple at 8.46%, Alphabet at 7.79%, and Amazon.com at 6.02%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Wellington U.S. Growth Active ETF (VUSG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, focusing on US companies with strong earnings-growth prospects. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation VUSG was launched on Nov 14, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
